html: The fact that I can take it with me? That I don’t need internet to still have access to deepseek? The fact that electricity is expensive and an mbp uses ~10% of the power that an equivalent vram set up would using gpu’s. Also, in order to get the same vram I would need to spend a similar amount, but wouldn’t also have a machine that was useful for other workloads that need a huge amount of ram.
